headlines.title: Video shows Madison police shoot and kill man who allegedly was armed with a knife
headlines.description: Madison, Wisconsin, police fatally shot a man that they say was armed with a knife after a report of someone "checking parked vehicles" authorities said. NBC News' Maggie Vespa reports.

headlines.title: China and the Philippines clash near disputed South China Sea shoal
headlines.description: China and the Philippines traded accusations after an encounter between their vessels in contested South China Sea waters. Manila said one of its navy personnel was struck on the head with a wooden baton while Beijing said its law enforcement officers were provoked.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall
headlines.description: As the center of Tropical Storm Bertha churns over Southeast Louisiana, the storm is packing a punch. NBC News’ George Solis has the new images now coming in.

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Oil prices surge toward triple digits after Red Sea attacks
headlines.description: Oil prices rose Thursday to their highest level since early June after the latest Iran war escalation threatened severe new disruption to global supplies.

headlines.title: Rep. Jim Jordan formally asks DOJ to prosecute Jack Smith over congressional testimony
headlines.description: Jordan, chair of the House Judiciary Committee, accused Smith of lying in his testimony before the committee in December. Smith’s lawyers denied he made any false statements.

headlines.title: The best ways to avoid (and treat) heat rash and sun poisoning, according to derms
headlines.description: I talked to dermatologists about the best way to avoid sun-related conditions outside of the usual sunburn, including heat rash and sun poisoning, plus the best treatments for these concerns

headlines.title: How to watch the 2026 MLS season
headlines.description: This is everything you need to know about watching the 2026 MLS season, including streaming options and info on when the season takes place.

headlines.title: How often should you wash and change out your sheets? Experts explain
headlines.description: I talked to laundry experts to learn how often you should change and wash your bedding and when it’s time to throw them out for a new set.

headlines.title: All the glow, none of the grease — the best hyaluronic acid products
headlines.description: Dermatologists share the best hyaluronic acid serums and creams to hydrate, plump and smooth your skin from brands like CeraVe and The Ordinary.

headlines.title: Rep. Jim Jordan formally asks DOJ to prosecute Jack Smith over congressional testimony
headlines.description: Jordan, chair of the House Judiciary Committee, accused Smith of lying in his testimony before the committee in December. Smith’s lawyers denied he made any false statements.
